personalize.solution.hpoconfig.CfnAbout: Describes the properties for hyperparameter optimization (HPO).

personalize.solution.hpoconfig.Algorithm.Description: The hyperparameters and their allowable ranges.

personalize.solution.hpoconfig.HpoObject.Description: The metric to optimize during HPO.  Amazon Personalize doesn't support configuring the `hpoObjective` at this time.

personalize.solution.hpoconfig.HpoResour.Description: Describes the resource configuration for HPO.
